equations: F(z)=P(z)R(z)/Q(z)
R(z)^2=prod_gamma(z-gamma), R(z)~z^2
Q(z)=prod_{k=1}^d (z-p_k) is monic
gammas=(alpha_1,beta_1,alpha_2,beta_2) with alpha_1<beta_1<alpha_2<beta_2
Q-poles p_k are real, simple, and off-cut; collisions/non-real poles route to Gate 3
equation_blocks.name: finite_gap_representation

equations: F(z)=m_F/z+O(z^-2) at infinity with m_F>0 fixed by the global normalization
for genus g=2 and deg Q=d, deg P <= d-3
in the cubic compact target d=3, P is constant after the mass scale is fixed
endpoint Schiffer correction directions use the zero-mass tangent row when that mass is held fixed
equation_blocks.name: mass_decay_normalization

equations: F is the Cauchy transform of a positive dual measure
on every complementary real interval, F'(x)=-int d lambda(t)/(x-t)^2 < 0
each complementary interval contains at most one zero of F
zeros, real simple Q-poles, and branch endpoints interlace
residues Res_{z=p_k} F are positive at atom poles
cut density rho(x)=-(1/pi) Im F_+(x) is positive on both bands
non-real poles, multiple poles, zero residues, pole-cut collisions, or density sign loss route to Gate 3
equation_blocks.name: positivity_interlacing

equations: q log(1/a)+W(u)=0
q log(1/b)+W(v)=0
a W'(u)+b W'(v)=0
equation_blocks.name: endpoint_neck_equations

equations: TODO: exact period/filling row
TODO: definition and orientation of kappa
equation_blocks.name: period_filling_convention

equations: TODO: rule selecting Z0 components
TODO: rule selecting u,c,v,a,b used by Gate 1 residual rows
equation_blocks.name: Z0_boundary_row_selection

row_gauge.omit_q_pole_index: integer index of exterior omitted Q-pole

required_proofs: G1FullPairGaugeDet gives det A_pair > 0 for real simple selected poles
non-exterior omitted pole is rejected by the current LRLR audit contract
remaining pole/residue/period quantities are state outputs or open inequalities, not rows of A

selected_gauge.omitted_pair_rule: omit exactly one complete Q-pole pair; for the ordinary LRLR connection audit the omitted pole must lie in an exterior component, otherwise that gauge is rejected or routed to a separate singular/connection-gap case
selected_gauge.rows: H(p_i), H'(p_i) for d-1 selected complete pole pairs

purpose: Executable mathematical contract for producing a proof-grade compact non-pinched g=2 chart JSON.

P_coefficients: P coefficients in the chart degree range fixed by mass_decay_normalization
degree and leading/decay normalization are not guessed here
Q_poles: d is the chart Q-degree; cubic d=3 is the current compact g=2 numerical target
state_variables: residue or pole-state variables subject to positivity/interlacing equations
u,c,v and positive boundary weights a,b, fixed by Z0_boundary_row_selection
period/filling variable fixing kappa, fixed by period_filling_convention
